decision-tree.root-question: Does the new test touch any I/O (DB, HTTP, queue, file system)?

branch.conclusion: Unit test. Place under `tests/unit/`. No fixtures beyond hypothesis.

branch.question: Does the test verify behaviour at a boundary owned by a different team or service?

branch.conclusion: Contract test (Pact). Place under `tests/contract/`. Publish to broker.

branch.question: Is the test verifying a multi-page user journey on a revenue-critical path AND no integration test can prove it?

branch.conclusion: E2E test. Place under `tests/e2e/`. Keep count <= 5% of suite.
Integration test. Place under `tests/integration/`. MUST validate response body against the OpenAPI schema for the called operation.

example.p: New test for a 422 response on POST /checkout. Touches I/O (yes), crosses team boundary (no — same team), revenue-critical journey (no — single endpoint) → integration test with schema validation.
